# Kabbalah Circle

> Free Kabbalah Tikkun astrology readings. Discover the Shadow patterns (Gilgul), spiritual work (Tikkun), and daily mantra (Kavanah) tied to your date of birth.

Kabbalah Circle is an independent project sharing Kabbalistic astrology rooted in the Sefer Yetzirah and the Zohar. Visitors receive a free Tikkun chart based on the lunar nodes at their date of birth.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Free Tikkun astrology reading — spin the wheel and reveal your patterns.
- [A Brief History of Kabbalah Astrology](/history): Origins of Kabbalah astrology in the Sefer Yetzirah and the Zohar.
- [About](/about): About Marc and the Kabbalah Circle project.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your data.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms): Terms for using the reading service.
